programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate summer vacation by getting SAND BLASTED, take a trip to PAINLAND and party with THE BANG GANG.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 820
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.desc: When Andy answers a domestic disturbance call, the social worker turns out to be her estranged mother.

programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe.

programme.desc: A gifted psychic (or a gifted conman) helps find the missing witness in an organized-crime case.

programme.desc: While Amy works with a challenging horse, she also revives a dream to rebuild the jumping course.

programme.title: Sins of a Father
programme.desc: After a break-in, unwelcome memories of his father flood Jack, Amy and Logan work with a wild horse.

programme.title: Sins of a Father
programme.desc: After a break-in, unwelcome memories of his father flood Jack, Amy and Logan work with a wild horse.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Morgan throws Christina an 18th-birthday bash, she cuts LC and Lo from the guest list, so bumping into them the next day at the nail salon was sweet irony. Christina and Morgan then head to NYC for their spring break trip.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After the craziness of Cabo, Kristin invites Stephen to a Blink 182 concert with the hopes of getting back together. LC, Lo, Trey and Dieter also hit the show and when an outsider insults LC and Lo's character, Trey steps up in their defense.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's prom time, and while everyone is caught up with who's going with whom, which pair of Charles David shoes look best with their dress, and how to fit everyone in the stretch Hummer-limo, Kristin's biggest concern is a drama-free night with Stephen.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Graduation day is here and the seniors spend time with their families getting ready for the big event. Through a Senior Video Project, the seniors reveal their personal thoughts on graduation, senior year, and life after Laguna.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Free from school, the gang lives up their last summer together, but when they gather for a final barbeque at Trey's house, the reality of leaving Laguna and each other starts to sink in.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's Christmas break in Laguna Beach. Kristin has ruled the school, LC is leaving San Francisco and the drama is all around.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Love and Laguna Beach mix like chocolate and onions. Things with Stephen and Kristin are dunzo, but what about him and LC? And rumors about Jason and Alex M abound.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's B-day time in LB for both Kristen and LC. Kristen and Talan flirt up a storm, while old feelings stir between Stephen and LC at her party south of the border.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jason and Talan stir up all kinds of trouble when their eyes start to wander from their girlfriends Jessica and Taylor.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's time to suit up for the LB Winter Formal and nothing causes more drama than a girl asks boy dance. Drama is what Jason gets when he goes with Alex M not Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Valentine's Day brings nothing but trouble for Jessica who's still desperately hanging on to Jason (whose heart is clearly elsewhere).

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The LB hotties head from the beach to the slopes to cheer up Jessica after Jason calls them dunzo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Today is the Umi City Kite Festival and Jeannie can't wait to fly her beautiful dragon kite. Suddenly, a big gust of wind blows the kite's pieces far and wide throughout Umi City.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call – Blaze’s friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck’s baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It’s up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah wishes for help making cupcakes for a bake sale, she and the genies find themselves stuck with a giant birthday cake, some farm animals, and a river of cupcake batter. How will Leah finish without any wishes left?

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Zeg has a ticket to ride a brand new dinosaur roller coaster: the Dinocoaster! But when the ticket blows away, it’s up to Blaze to help his buddy track it down and get back to the amusement park in time.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 215

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When the girls accidentally cause Nazboo to inflate like a balloon, Zeta must help them reverse the spell. A sneezing bug buzzes through Zahramay Falls, causing all the genies to create hilarious magic when they sneeze.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shimmer, Shine and Leah travel to a magical new land called Zahramay Skies and meet Adara, the Stardust Princess. But when Zeta shows up and lets all of Adara's stars loose, the girls must work together to retrieve the stars and save Zahramay Skies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls partake in a Zahracorn Race. Zeta and Nazboo enter with a tiny, speedy Zahracorn named Tickles. The girls take Adara's Zahracorn to the salon, but must track her down when she gets spooked by all the salon magic.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Jake calls in from his class trip at the Umi City Carnival. The class is having a great time on the rides, but Jake has lost his favourite stuffed animal Bunny! Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines! When a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends beat Crusher! Part 2.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Leah and Zac want to twirl, leap, and reenact their new favorite ballet, Swan Lake. Leah wishes to be a ballerina like the Swan Queen, but the genies mistakenly make her a queen of real swans!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 210

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Zeg the dinosaur truck accidentally puts on a set of "Super Bouncy Tires," he bounces out of control! Now Blaze and AJ have to experiment to find a substance adhesive enough to stop their bouncing buddy.
